title: Meridian Audio and Leon Collaborate on New Edge Media Frame
bodyHtml:
Meridian Audio and Leon Collaborate on New Edge Media Frame

The Edge Media Frame for Meridian houses both the display and speakers in a custom-built, solid hardwood frame.

Meridian Audio and Leon have launched the Edge Media Frame for Meridian. This practical, on-wall solution combines Meridian’s architectural loudspeakers with displays, integrating Meridian’s audio technology with Leon’s expertise in media frames to deliver both high-quality sound and clean aesthetics.

Designed to be compatible with Meridian’s range of in-wall architectural loudspeakers, including the DSP520.2, DSP640.2, DSP730, and DSP750, the Edge Media Frame for Meridian houses both the display and speakers in a custom-built, solid hardwood frame.

By concealing TV wiring and mounting hardware, the system ensures that high-end sound and design work together, enhancing the look of Meridian’s audio solutions without compromising on functionality.

Available in either vertical Profile or classic Horizon soundbar orientation, and with options for both stereo and LCR configurations, the Edge Media Frame for Meridian is custom-built to adapt to any space and style.

Its slimmed-down profile and multiple configuration options are ideal for integrators and specifiers looking for a refined, high-performance, and versatile solution.

The Leon Edge for Meridian is available for purchase to North American Leon distributors online at https://www.leonspeakers.com/edge-media-frame-meridian

Meridian’s DSP520.2, DSP640.2, DSP730, and DSP750 in-wall speakers are available from Meridian’s American distributor, Apex Technologies US — https://www.apex-tech.us/.

‍

‍
